scripts.release:check: pnpm run build && pnpm run test && rm -rf .release-pack && mkdir -p .release-pack && PACK_DEST="$PWD/.release-pack" && pnpm --dir core/protocol pack --pack-destination "$PACK_DEST" && pnpm --dir core/runtime pack --pack-destination "$PACK_DEST" && pnpm --dir cli pack --pack-destination "$PACK_DEST" && pnpm --dir mcp-server pack --pack-destination "$PACK_DEST" && pnpm --dir relay pack --pack-destination "$PACK_DEST"
